final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotion campaign.

Style/medium: complex editorial poster with decorative art typography and layered font stacking
Composition: 16:9 horizontal layout; product or hero subject overlapping and partially obscuring background typography layers
Subject: promotional product(s) or hero subject blocking some of the stacked text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: visually complex but not chaotic; must include decorative art lettering, stacked/layered typography, and a product or subject that physically overlaps and covers portions of the text
Avoid: clean minimal layout; sparse text; text fully visible without any overlap
